name: Cowboy Cookies, Kansas Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda.
2. In a large bowl, blend the shortening and sugars until well combined.
3. Add the eggs to the mixture and beat until fluffy.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the shortening mixture and mix well.
5. Fold in the oats last, then stir in the vanilla extract and chocolate chips. Add nuts if desired.
6. The dough will be crumbly. Use a teaspoon to drop portions of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Makes approximately 5 dozen cookies.
